title: Twilight (disambiguation)
content:
'''Twilight''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''''[[Twilight]]''''', a [[G9 Rigger-class light freighter|G9 ''Rigger''-class light freighter]]
*The [[61st Mobile Infantry]], also called '''Twilight Company''', a [[Alliance Military|military]] [[Company|unit]] in the [[Alliance Army|Alliance]] and [[New Republic army]]

==Legends==
===Vehicles===
*The '''''[[Twilight/Legends|Twilight]]''''', a [[G9 Rigger-class light freighter/Legends|G9 Rigger-class light freighter]]
*The '''''[[Twilight Jumper]]''''', a starship
*The '''''[[Twilight Sailer]]''''', a sail barge
* The '''''[[Emerald Twilight]]''''', a starship
*The '''[[RC-2 Twilight scoutship]]''', a Galactic Alliance scouting vessel

===Groups===
*The '''[[Disciples of Twilight]]''', a group founded by the below-mentioned person
*'''[[Twilight Class]]''', a class taught at the Galactic Outdoor Survival School
*'''[[Twilight Squadron (Imperial)|Twilight Squadron]]''', an Imperial TIE/ln starfighter squadron
*'''[[Twilight Squadron (Rebel)|Twilight Squadron]]''', a Rebel SpecForce squadron

===Other===
*'''[[Twilight (individual)|Twilight]]''', a person
*'''[[Twilight (operation)|''Twilight'']]''', an Imperial operation
*'''''[[Killik Twilight]]''''', an Alderaanian moss-painting
*The '''[[Twilight Fountains]]''', in the city of Sath

==Real world==
*'''''[[Planet of Twilight]]''''', a Legends novel in the [[Callista trilogy]] by Barbara Hambly <small>([[Planet of Twilight (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]])</small>
*'''''[[Star Wars: Twilight]]''''', a story arc of the Legends comic series ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' <small>([[Star Wars: Twilight (TPB)|TPB]])</small>
*'''''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]''''', a Legends novel in the ''[[Star Wars: Coruscant Nights]]'' trilogy by Michael Reaves
*'''''[[Twi'light Storm]]''''', a Legends role-playing adventure of the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force campaign]]
*'''''[[Fierce Twilight]]''''', a Legends online flash game at [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']] page on the [[Cartoon Network]] website
*'''''[[Battlefront: Twilight Company]]''''', a 2015 Canon novel by Alexander Freed <small>([[Battlefront: Twilight Company (audiobook)|audiobook]])</small>
